patterns: can i get my money back
responses: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all purchases. To request a refund, please type 'create ticket' and our customer service pipeline will log your request.

Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 days. You can track your order status in the customer portal or type 'create ticket' to log a tracking check.
Your order delivery details can be checked using your tracking ID. If you do not have it, let me know or type 'create ticket' to request manual tracking help.
